# Reusing and re-running {.unnumbered}

The workshop is taught; now keep it alive and reusable.

- @sec-new-iteration is the repeat-instructor run-book: the short path to spin up the next cohort once you already understand the setup.
- @sec-citation-license is how to keep the material a genuine Open Educational Resource: the license, the canonical citation, and minting a DOI so others can credit it.

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    classDef layer fill:#f7f9fc,stroke:#c7d2e0,color:#1f2933;

    A["<b>Spin up the next cohort</b><br/>new-iteration"]:::layer
    B["<b>Keep it open and citable</b><br/>citation-license"]:::layer

    A --> B
```
